title: "Screen size is larger than monitor"

forum: Multimedia &amp; Video

### Post by jazzman14 on 2008-03-08
Hi, I have two monitors set up. My right monitor is working fine, my left one has the whole panning issue, where if I move the whole screen moves because the screen is larger than the monitor. I have searched the forums and I am clueless. Also, how can I get xinerama to work? Here is my xorg.conf:
```
# xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)

#

# This file was generated by failsafeDexconf, using

# values from the debconf database and some overrides to use vesa mode.

#

# You should use dexconf or another such tool for creating a "real" xorg.conf

# For example:

#   sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg



Section "ServerLayout"

	Identifier	"Default Layout"

  Screen 0 "Screen0" 0 0

  Screen 1 "Screen1" LeftOf "Screen0"

	Inputdevice	"Generic Keyboard"

	Inputdevice	"Configured Mouse"

EndSection



Section "Files"

EndSection



Section "Module"

	Load		"glx"

	Load		"GLcore"

	Load		"v4l"

EndSection



Section "InputDevice"

	Identifier	"Generic Keyboard"

	Driver		"kbd"

	Option		"CoreKeyboard"

	Option		"XkbRules"	"xorg"

	Option		"XkbModel"	"pc105"

	Option		"XkbLayout"	"us"

EndSection



Section "InputDevice"

	Identifier	"Configured Mouse"

	Driver		"mouse"

	Option		"CorePointer"

	Option		"Device"	"/dev/input/mice"

	Option		"Protocol"	"ImPS/2"

	Option		"ZAxisMapping"	"4 5"

	Option		"Emulate3Buttons"	"true"

EndSection



Section "Device"

	Identifier	"Device0"

	Boardname	"ATI Radeon 8500"

	Busid		"PCI:1:0:0"

	Driver		"ati"

	Vendorname	"ATI"

	Option		"MergedFB"	"off"

EndSection



Section "Device"  

	Identifier	"Device1"

	Boardname	"RIVA TNT2"

	Busid		"PCI:2:13:0"

	Driver		"nv"

	Vendorname	"RIVA"

EndSection



Section "Monitor"

	Identifier	"Monitor0"

	Vendorname	"Generic CRT Display"

	Modelname	"Monitor 1024x768"

	Horizsync	31.5-61.0

	Vertrefresh	50-75



  modeline  "1024x768@75" 78.8 1024 1040 1136 1312 768 769 772 800 +hsync +vsync



	Gamma	1.0

EndSection



Section "Monitor" 

	Identifier	"Monitor1"

	Vendorname	"Generic CRT Display"

	Modelname	"Monitor 1024x768"

	Horizsync	31.5-61.0

	Vertrefresh	50-75



  modeline  "1024x768@75" 78.8 1024 1040 1136 1312 768 769 772 800 +hsync +vsync



	Gamma	1.0

EndSection





Section "Screen"

	Identifier	"Screen0"

	Device		"Device0"

	Monitor		"Monitor0"

	Defaultdepth	24

	SubSection "Display"

		Depth	24

		Virtual	1280	960

		Modes		"1024x768@75"

	EndSubSection

EndSection







Section "Screen"

	Identifier	"Screen1"

	Device		"Device1"

	Monitor		"Monitor1"

	Defaultdepth	24

	SubSection "Display"

		Depth	24

		Virtual	1280	960

		Modes		"1024x768@75"	

	EndSubSection

EndSection



Section "ServerFlags"



EndSection
```

As you can see: I have a riva tnt 2 (nvidia) and an ati radeon...apparently its an 8500?
